name: Feature Request

---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of the proposed solution or feature.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that help explain the feature request.

## Would you be willing to submit a PR for this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to contribute this feature
